name: Fluoxetine may increase methadone exposure
actions: Use caution when methadone is combined with fluoxetine.
Monitor for increased methadone effect, oversedation, and respiratory depression (educational).

rationale: Fluoxetine can inhibit metabolic pathways involved in methadone clearance.
Combined use may increase methadone exposure and opioid toxicity risk.

explanation_template: {B_name} may increase methadone exposure when combined with {A_name}, increasing the risk of sedation and respiratory depression.
